case_title: PHUONG PHAM VS. CSA TRAVEL PROTECTION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANDREW BOTTERI--TECHNICAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT TODAY. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CSA TRAVEL PROTECTION
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHAM, PHUONG

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHAM, PHUONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CSA TRAVEL PROTECTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY PHAM, PHUONG AS TO DEFENDANT CSA TRAVEL PROTECTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-02-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
